events.note: IJ #1 — patient found dying on floor, IV disconnected
IJ #2 + EMTALA violation — 18 patients harmed 2022-23, 4 deaths (ED and oncology); 384-page CMS report Feb 15, 2024
IJ #3 — preventable death, unsafe transport, misidentification, infection control
IJ #4 — repeat findings; removed 2026-03-04 after Enhanced Plan of Correction approved 2026-01-29

hcahps.source: CMS Provider Data Catalog, dataset dgck-syfz; updates quarterly

summaryStarByYear.note: 2018-2024 compiled from Asheville Watchdog / Wake Forest analyses of CMS archives; 2025 from current CMS API

hcahps.goal: 4 stars by 2028 (pre-sale level); 3 stars interim (national par)

staffToBedRatio.source: Medicare cost reports via Wake Forest report (NC Health News, 2025-02-08)

travelers.source: News-reported estimates; audited data from Medicare cost report Worksheet S-3 (contract labor hours vs employed), ~1yr lag

estimates.basis: union nurse statement; staff estimated ~50% in some units

travelers.context: 660+ RNs lost across HCA Asheville facilities 2022-23; ~1,500 temps hired; 182 open nursing positions listed 2024-04; HCA planned ~800 FTE cuts at purchase

staffing.costReportDownload: https://www.cms.gov/data-research/statistics-trends-and-reports/cost-reports/cost-reports-fiscal-year (HCRIS, Form 2552-10, Worksheet S-3 Parts II/V; filter provider 340002)

physicians.source: CMS Doctors & Clinicians facility affiliation dataset 27ea-46a8
physicians.goal: Stable or growing count (proxy for practices attracting/retaining physicians)

residency.source: NRMP Match results, annual each March (program-level); MAHEC + Mission/HCA GME programs

latestReported.note: residents & fellows welcomed, most recent reported class

residency.goal: 100% fill in main Match, no SOAP reliance

notReportable.goodVsBadExperienceReports: No official dataset; proxies are HCAHPS 9-10 vs <=6 ratings or review sentiment
notReportable.practicePhysicianRetention: Not publicly reported; CMS affiliation count is the proxy
